issues.description: Action type 'Rest' is incorrect. The effect should reduce cost (−2 cost), not rest a character. Should use 'PowerBoost' with negative value or a cost reduction mechanic, but 'Rest' does not match the card text.

Target maxCost is 3, but card text specifies 'give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −2 cost during this turn' — this is a cost reduction effect, not a cost-based selection criteria. The condition for which characters can be targeted is not clearly limited by cost in the original text.
Card text states 'during this turn' which indicates a duration-limited effect. DSL is missing duration field. Should include duration:'DuringYourTurn' to enforce the turn-limited scope.

Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and action to KO character with maxCost 3 is unexplained and does not match card text. Card describes a single Main effect with two sequential actions. This extra trigger is spurious.
